block_00: How to keep your trading privileges
block_03: It’s our duty to inform you about an upcoming piece of legislation from the European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA) that will affect your trading experience in the near future. As a broker licensed in the EU, IQ Option will have to implement the following restrictions:
block_05: A total ban of Binary options
block_07: Leverage no higher than 30:1 on CFDs and Forex:
block_08: Leverage limit of 2:1 on Cryptocurrency trading.
block_09: All of the listed restrictions will affect Retail clients of IQ Option Europe Ltd. However, Professional clients may choose to be exempted from said restrictions.
block_10: Find out if you qualify for  the Professional client status to lift the new trading restrictions:
